title: Feedback Room
lore: Recorded in a rehearsal space where the monitors never quite stopped ringing — Lana Del Delay called the room a collaborator and billed it as co-producer.
artistPersona: Cinematic dream-pop producer — baroque melancholy meets infinite tape delay. Every track runs through at least three delay pedals; the name is the signal chain.
albumConcept: Tape hiss, lantern glow, and infinite feedback — Lana Del Delay's slowest ride home.
